scripts.db:seed-from-export: NODE_ENV=development LOG_LEVEL=info tsx scripts/with-api-env.ts tsx scripts/seed-from-export.ts
scripts.jobs:studio: NODE_ENV=development tsx scripts/with-api-env.ts bash -c 'docker run --name=bullstudio --rm -d --network=host -e PORT=4010 -e REDIS_URL=$REDIS_URL emirce/bullstudio && trap "docker stop bullstudio" INT TERM && echo "bullstudio running at http://localhost:4010" && sleep infinity'
scripts.local-ci-run-tests: docker build . --target test -t plantopo-test && export GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY=/tmp/github-step-summary.md && >$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY && GITHUB_ACTIONS=true ./scripts/ci-run-tests.sh; bat $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY 2>/dev/null || cat $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/web/tsconfig.json && prettier --write --log-level warn . && eslint --fix .
scripts.test:docker: docker build --target test -t plantopo-test . && (docker run --name plantopo-test-run --network host plantopo-test; EXIT=$?; docker cp plantopo-test-run:/app/packages/api/src/staticmap/test-fixtures/snapshots/. packages/api/src/staticmap/test-fixtures/snapshots/ 2>/dev/null; docker rm plantopo-test-run; exit $EXIT)
